title: craftable saddle and horse armor
description: This mod is for those who wants to be ablew to craft horse armor and saaddles.
body:
This mod introduces Iron, Gold, and Diamond armor sets, providing extra protection and style for your adventures in Minecraft. Equip yourself with powerful armor that suits your playstyle, whether you prefer the resilience of Iron, the prestige of Gold, or the unmatched durability of Diamond.

Additionally, the mod adds the ability to craft saddles. To craft a saddle, you'll need brains and leather, making it a valuable and rewarding item to create. Now, you can easily prepare for your journeys by crafting your own saddle whenever you need one.
